description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 2/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Move agent-owned configuration inside `agent do` where it belongs.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Completed with commit 4213ba4: model, instructions, character, context, and output now live on the primary agent contract entity; the compiler no longer reads defaults or agent.schema for generated agents, and tests/fixtures were migrated to the agent :id do ... end shape.

title: E1: Move agent-owned configuration inside agent do where it belongs
